content.text:
{
  "dimension": "anti-pattern-avoidance",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach avoids the priority AoA anti-patterns cleanly across all turns. There is no fixing-people (no advice about finding available partners, no attachment-style diagnosis despite the client baiting it in turn 5 with 'anxious attachment, avoidant partners'), no view-as-technique (questions are warm and follow the client's actual material, not signature questions deployed mechanically), no wonder-as-strategy (questions are spaced, single, and connective rather than rapid-fire investigation), no dont-fight-the-voice (coach does not argue with the disdain or the deflection), no loving-to-transform (coach does not escalate vigor when client deflects in turn 5 or 7 — just continues to invite), no evangelizing (no AoA jargon deployed), and notably no colluding with the victim frame in turn 7 when client baits it heavily with the eye-roll about the ex. The turn-8 pivot to 'what happens in your body when someone pursues you' is the exact un-trap move — declining the victim-frame bait and redirecting to the receiving stance. The coach also avoids the dont-fight-identity trap from expected_territory by not confronting the 'expert in my pattern' identity directly but inviting curiosity around it ('does it feel like protection?'). Positive avoidance of baited anti-patterns is visible.",
  "evidence_turns": [4, 6, 8, 10, 14],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Connective noticing of the laugh; not a technique deployment."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Declines to engage the 'expert' identity as something to dismantle; offers it gently as possibly protective. Avoids dont-fight-identity."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Declines the victim-frame bait from turn 5; pivots toward the receiving stance without accusation."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "When client baits with disdain for ex in turn 7, coach refuses to collude and instead redirects to the body and pursuit. Avoids fixing-people and victim-collusion."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Holds the client at the edge of the felt experience without arguing with the laugh-deflection. Avoids dont-fight-the-voice."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Minimal, spacious invitation ('say more about that') — avoids wonder-as-strategy stacking."},
    {"turn": 14, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Moves toward the avoided emotion (the abyss of being received) without naming it as theory or evangelizing. No premature grief work."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["if-i-were-inherently-good", "feeling-the-unfelt-emotion", "defensiveness-as-identity-signal"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["deconstruct-the-victim-to-release-anger", "i-dont-buy-your-story"],
  "notes": "Scoring is strictly on anti-pattern avoidance; territory misses noted for other dimensions but do not affect this score since the avoidance bar is met."
}
